differentials.name: Cockett group group of 3 veins located 7, 12, 18 cm above the tip of medial malleolus connecting posterior arch vein with posterior tibial vein
differentials.raw: Cockett group group of 3 veins located 7, 12, 18 cm above the tip of medial malleolus connecting posterior arch vein with posterior tibial vein

differentials.name: Boyd vein located 10 cm below knee joint connecting main trunk of greater saphenous vein to posterior tibial veins
differentials.raw: Boyd vein located 10 cm below knee joint connecting main trunk of greater saphenous vein to posterior tibial veins

differentials.name: Dodd group group of 1 or 2 veins passing through Hunter canal (= subsartorial canal) to join greater saphenous vein with superficial femoral vein
differentials.raw: Dodd group group of 1 or 2 veins passing through Hunter canal (= subsartorial canal) to join greater saphenous vein with superficial femoral vein
